pending.body: Transient final-review availability failures still hard-fail `run start` and `run resume` before the new retry wrapper is ever reached. `execute_run` and `resume_run_with_retry_internal` still call `preflight_check` (`src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:1559`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:2346-2356`), and the final-review branch there performs single-shot `check_availability` probes through `preflight_required_panel_target` / `preflight_panel_members` (`src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:377-401`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:473-503`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:509-603`). A one-off arbiter/reviewer network blip in those preflights still aborts the whole run, so the original “single transient final_review backend error kills the run” failure mode remains reachable outside the stage-dispatch path.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 9 -> Plan and Implement
